scripts.test: cucumber-js; npm run report:generate --silent; echo "\nRun 'npm run report:open' to view report"
scripts.test:login: cucumber-js --tags @login; npm run report:generate --silent; echo "\nRun 'npm run report:open' to view report"
scripts.test:inventory: cucumber-js --tags @inventory; npm run report:generate --silent; echo "\nRun 'npm run report:open' to view report"
scripts.test:cart: cucumber-js --tags @cart; npm run report:generate --silent; echo "\nRun 'npm run report:open' to view report"
scripts.test:hamburger: cucumber-js --tags @hamburger; npm run report:generate --silent; echo "\nRun 'npm run report:open' to view report"
